title: Nepal features in Wanderlust UK, reaching over 137,000 readers - The Tourism Times
description: Nepal features in Wanderlust UK, reaching over 137,000 readers  The Tourism Times
publisher.title: The Tourism Times
full_article:
KATHMANDU: Nepal continues to draw international attention as part of the Nepal Tourism Board's (NTB) ongoing global promotional efforts, with Wanderlust UK featuring the country in its February/March edition.

The feature showcases Nepal's Himalayan landscapes, cultural heritage, authentic experiences, and hospitality to a global readership. According to NTB, the edition reaches 137,959 print and digital readers, while Wanderlust's online platform attracts more than 12 million visitors annually — further boosting Nepal's visibility in key international tourism markets.

The feature highlights Nepal's mountains, traditions, and adventure offerings, positioning the country as a top-of-mind destination for travellers seeking meaningful cultural and natural experiences.

NTB said the placement is part of its continued strategy to strengthen Nepal's presence in major international tourism markets through high-reach publications.

translated:
काठमाण्डु : नेपाल पर्यटन बोर्ड (एनटीबी) केरऽ जारी वैश्विक प्रचार प्रयास के तहत नेपाल अंतरराष्ट्रीय ध्यान आकर्षित करना जारी रखै छै, जेकरा म॑ वांडरलस्ट यूके न॑ अपनऽ फरवरी/मार्च संस्करण म॑ देश क॑ पेश करलकै ।

एहि फीचर मे नेपालक हिमालयी परिदृश्य, सांस्कृतिक धरोहर, प्रामाणिक अनुभव, आ वैश्विक पाठक वर्गक आतिथ्यक प्रदर्शन कयल गेल अछि । एनटीबी के अनुसार ई संस्करण 137,959 प्रिंट आरू डिजिटल रीडर तक पहुँचै छै, जबकि वांडरलस्ट केरऽ ऑनलाइन प्लेटफॉर्म सालाना 1.2 करोड़ स॑ भी अधिक आगंतुकऽ क॑ आकर्षित करै छै — जेकरा स॑ प्रमुख अंतर्राष्ट्रीय पर्यटन बाजारऽ म॑ नेपाल केरऽ दृश्यता आरू बढ़ी जाय छै ।

ई सुविधा नेपाल केरऽ पहाड़, परंपरा, आरू रोमांच केरऽ प्रस्तावऽ प॑ प्रकाश डालै छै, जेकरा स॑ देश क॑ सार्थक सांस्कृतिक आरू प्राकृतिक अनुभव चाहै वाला यात्री सिनी लेली एगो शीर्ष-आधारित गंतव्य के रूप म॑ स्थापित करलऽ गेलऽ छै ।

एनटीबी कहलकै कि ई प्लेसमेंट उच्च पहुँच वाला प्रकाशन के माध्यम स॑ प्रमुख अंतर्राष्ट्रीय पर्यटन बाजारऽ म॑ नेपाल केरऽ उपस्थिति क॑ मजबूत करै के अपनऽ निरंतर रणनीति के हिस्सा छेकै ।

title: Nepal Teachers’ Federation forms Kathmandu district committee for the first time - Khabarhub
description: Nepal Teachers’ Federation forms Kathmandu district committee for the first time  Khabarhub
publisher.title: Khabarhub
full_article:
KATHMANDU: The Nepal Teachers’ Federation has formed its Kathmandu District Committee for the first time, unanimously electing Ganesh Prasad Guragain as its founding chairperson.

According to the federation, a 27-member district working committee was unanimously selected under Guragain’s leadership. He previously served as chairperson of the Kathmandu Metropolitan Committee of the Nepal National Teachers’ Organization.

Krishna Raj Kattel has been elected vice-chairperson, Basudev Khanal as vice-chairperson, Tara Adhikari as women vice-chairperson, Narayan Prasad Gautam as secretary, Samundra Timilsina as open joint secretary, Govinda Prasad Paudel as joint secretary (finance), Anita Adhikari as women joint secretary, and Diwas Babu Pokharel and Ram Hari Dhakal as institutional joint secretaries.

The committee members include Surya Bahadur Khadka, Chakra Bahadur Bista, Bhagawati Silwal, Sarita Kumari Prasain, Shravan Basnet, Tara Mishra, Sumitra Sigdel, Babita Sahi Thakuri, Dinesh Lama, Bharat Bhandari, Srijana Khadka Giri, Surya Kumar Upadhyay, Dilli Raj Gyawali, Binod Khanal, Sushila Khanal, Bir Ballabh Ghimire, and Tejendra Subedi.

The committee formation program was attended by federation Chairperson Laxmi Kishor Subedi, General Secretary Tula Bahadur Thapa, Nepal National Teachers’ Organization Chairperson Hans Bahadur Shahi, Nepal Teachers’ Organization Chairperson Somnath Giri, School Employees’ Council Chairperson Gangaram Tiwari, and other teacher leaders.
translated:
काठमाण्डू, मिथिला मिरर: नेपाल शिक्षक महासंघ पहिल बेर अपन काठमांडू जिल्ला समिति गठन कए सर्वसम्मति स गणेश प्रसाद गुरागैन कए संस्थापक अध्यक्ष चुनल गेल अछि।

महासंघ के अनुसार गुरागैन के नेतृत्व में सर्वसम्मति स 27 सदस्यीय जिला कार्यसमिति के चयन कायल गेल। पूर्वमे नेपाल राष्ट्रिय शिक्षक संगठनके काठमाण्डौ महानगर समितिके अध्यक्षके रुपमे कार्यरत छल ।

कृष्णराज कट्टल उपाध्यक्ष, बासुदेव खनाल उपाध्यक्ष, तारा अधिकारी महिला उपाध्यक्ष, नारायण प्रसाद गौतम सचिव, समुंद्र तिमिल्सिना खुला संयुक्त सचिव, गोविन्द प्रसाद पौडेल संयुक्त सचिव (वित्त), अनिता अधिकारी महिला संयुक्त सचिव, आ दिवास बाबू चुनल गेल छथि पोखरेल एवं राम हरि ढकाल संस्थागत संयुक्त सचिव के रूप में |

समिति के सदस्यों में सूर्य बहादुर खडका, चक्र बहादुर बिष्ट, भगवती सिलवाल, सरिता कुमारी प्रसैन, श्रावण बस्नेत, तारा मिश्रा, सुमित्रा सिगदेल, बबिता साही ठकुरी, दिनेश लामा, भारत भण्डारी, सृजना खड्का गिरी, सूर्य कुमार उपाध्याय, दिली राज ज्ञवाली, बिनोद खनाल, सुशीला खनाल, बीर बल्लभ घिमिरे, एवं तेजेन्द्र सुबेदी।

समिति गठन कार्यक्रम मे महासंघ अध्यक्ष लक्ष्मी किशोर सुबेदी, महासचिव तुला बहादुर थापा, नेपाल राष्ट्रिय शिक्षक संगठन अध्यक्ष हंसबहादुर शाही, नेपाल शिक्षक संगठन अध्यक्ष सोमनाथ गिरी, विद्यालय कर्मचारी परिषद् अध्यक्ष गंगाराम तिवारी, सहित अन्य शिक्षक नेतागण उपस्थित रहे ।

title: Bosch Home Appliances appoints Asmi Shrestha as Nepal brand ambassador - The Himalayan Times
description: Bosch Home Appliances appoints Asmi Shrestha as Nepal brand ambassador  The Himalayan Times
publisher.title: The Himalayan Times
full_article:
KATHMANDU, JULY 4

Bosch Home Appliances has appointed model and entrepreneur Asmi Shrestha as its brand ambassador for Nepal.

Related Articles Syakar Trading launches premium Honda service centres, plans nationwide expansion Coca-Cola Nepal launches FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign, appoints Pradeep Khadka as brand ambassador

The company said the partnership aims to strengthen Bosch's presence in the Nepali market and expand its reach among consumers seeking premium home appliances.

Shrestha, winner of Miss Nepal World 2016 and founder of Asmi Shrestha Interiors, will represent the brand's focus on German engineering, innovative technology, elegant design and product reliability.

title: OPPO launches A6s Pro smartphone in Nepal at Rs 56,999 - The Himalayan Times
description: OPPO launches A6s Pro smartphone in Nepal at Rs 56,999  The Himalayan Times
publisher.title: The Himalayan Times
full_article:
KATHMANDU, JULY 4

OPPO has launched the A6s Pro smartphone in the Nepali market with a starting price of Rs 56,999.

Related Articles Iran's highly enriched uranium likely is at the Isfahan site, the UN nuclear chief tells the AP Iran doubles down on closing the Strait of Hormuz as the ceasefire inches toward expiration

The new smartphone features a 6.57-inch AMOLED display with a 120Hz refresh rate, a 50MP ultra-wide front camera, a 50MP dual rear camera setup and a 7,000mAh battery with 80W SUPERVOOC fast charging.

Powered by the MediaTek Helio G100 Max processor, the device also comes with IP69K-rated water and dust resistance and is available in Lumina Forest and Eclipse Blue colour options.

The OPPO A6s Pro (8GB RAM and 256GB storage) is now available through authorised retail outlets across Nepal. Customers purchasing the device between July 3 and August 2 will also be eligible for a two-month replacement policy, subject to the company's terms and conditions.

The company said the device is also available through EMI financing options.

title: Nepal SBI Bank wins four international banking awards - The Himalayan Times
description: Nepal SBI Bank wins four international banking awards  The Himalayan Times
publisher.title: The Himalayan Times
full_article:
KATHMANDU, JULY 4

Nepal SBI Bank Ltd. has received four international awards from Singapore-based Asian Banking & Finance (ABF) 2026 in recognition of its performance across wholesale and retail banking.

Related Articles Ranjit Acharya named jury member for Cannes Corporate Media & TV Awards Central bank withdrawing Rs 100 billion to manage liquidity

The bank was named Nepal Domestic Liquidity Management Bank of the Yearand Nepal Domestic Trade Finance Bank of the Year under the Wholesale Banking Awards category. It also received the Domestic Retail Bank of the Year – Nepal and SME Bank of the Year – Nepal awards under the Retail Banking Awards.

The bank said the awards recognise its performance in liquidity management, trade finance and innovation in both wholesale and retail banking services.

Established 32 years ago, Nepal SBI Bank currently operates 103 branches, 22 extension counters, 21 branchless banking units, 127 ATMs, seven provincial offices and a corporate office across the country.
translated:
काठमाण्डू, ४ जुलाई

नेपाल एसबीआई बैंक लिमिटेड कए थोक आ खुदरा बैंकिंग मे अपन प्रदर्शन कए देखैत सिंगापुर स्थित एशियन बैंकिंग एंड फाइनेंस (एबीएफ) 2026 स चारिटा अंतरराष्ट्रीय पुरस्कार भेटल अछि।

संबंधित लेख रंजीत आचार्य कान कॉर्पोरेट मीडिया एंड टीवी अवार्ड्स के लिए जूरी सदस्य बनाया गया केंद्रीय बैंक तरलता के प्रबंधन के लिए 100 अरब रुपए निकालते हुए |

थोक बैंकिंग पुरस्कार श्रेणी अन्तर्गत नेपाल घरेलू तरलता प्रबंधन बैंक आ वर्ष नेपाल घरेलू व्यापार वित्त बैंक चुनल गेल अछि । एकरा खुदरा बैंकिंग पुरस्कार के तहत घरेलू खुदरा बैंक आफ द ईयर – नेपाल आरू एसएमई बैंक आफ द ईयर – नेपाल पुरस्कार भी मिललै ।

बैंक नँ कहलकै कि ई पुरस्कार थोक आरू खुदरा बैंकिंग सेवा दूनू मँ तरलता प्रबंधन, व्यापार वित्त आरू नवाचार मँ ओकरौ प्रदर्शन क पहचानै छै ।

title: Bara reclaims 15 bighas of encroached national forest - The Himalayan Times
description: Bara reclaims 15 bighas of encroached national forest  The Himalayan Times
publisher.title: The Himalayan Times
full_article:
BARA, JULY 4

The Division Forest Office, Bara, has reclaimed around 15 bighas of national forest land in Sakhuwaha of Kolhabi Municipality-5 after removing decades-long encroachment.

Related Articles Pokhara Metropolitan begins demolition of encroached structures in Prithvi Chowk 442 hectares of forest land encroachment cleared in Madhesh Province

According to the office, the land had been occupied and cultivated by locals for nearly two decades, with much of the encroachment dating back to the Maoist insurgency period.

A joint team of forest officials, Nepal Police and the Armed Police Force carried out the operation under security arrangements. Although no permanent structures were found on the site, the land had been under cultivation.

googletag.cmd.push(function() { googletag.display('div-gpt-ad-1686127029429-0'); }); googletag.cmd.push(function() { googletag.display('div-gpt-ad-1686127067910-0'); }); googletag.cmd.push(function() { googletag.display('div-gpt-ad-1686127112906-0'); });

Division Forest Officer Sujit Kumar Jha said repeated notices had been issued asking occupants to vacate the area before the clearance operation was launched.

The reclaimed land will now be fenced and replanted with forest and fruit species to prevent further encroachment. The office said it would continue legal action against illegal occupation of national forest land.

संबंधित लेख पोखरा महानगर मे मधेश प्रदेश मे 442 हेक्टेयर वन भूमि अतिक्रमण साफ भेल पृथ्वी चौक मे अतिक्रमित संरचना तोड़बाक काज शुरू

कार्यालय के अनुसार लगभग दू दशक स एहि जमीन पर स्थानीय लोक के कब्जा आ खेती छल, जाहि में अतिक्रमण के बहुत रास माओवादी विद्रोह काल स शुरू भेल छल।

वन अधिकारी, नेपाल प्रहरी आ सशस्त्र प्रहरी बलके संयुक्त टोली सुरक्षा व्यवस्था अन्तर्गत कार्यवाही केने अछि । ओना एहि स्थल पर कोनो स्थायी संरचना नहि भेटल छल, मुदा जमीन पर खेती भ चुकल छल।

title: Nepal sees rise in tourist arrivals by air in first six months - myRepublica
description: Nepal sees rise in tourist arrivals by air in first six months  myRepublica
publisher.title: myRepublica
full_article:
KATHMANDU, July 4: Nepal recorded a rise in foreign tourist arrivals by air during the first six months of 2026, according to the Nepal Tourism Board (NTB).

(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

NTB data show that 620,453 foreign tourists visited Nepal by air between January and June this year, up from 577,689 during the same period in 2025.

Related story Tourist arrivals up 28 percent in first half of 2017

The tourism board attributed the increase to the expansion of international flight services to and from Kathmandu, which has improved air connectivity.

According to the NTB, Nepal welcomed 92,573 foreign tourists in January, 105,441 in February, 102,516 in March, 107,934 in April, 102,626 in May and 91,363 in June this year.
translated:
काठमाण्डू, ४ जुलाई : नेपाल पर्यटन बोर्ड (एनटीबी) के अनुसार २०२६ के पहिल ६ महिना के दौरान हवाई मार्ग सँ विदेशी पर्यटक के आगमन मे वृद्धि दर्ज करल गेल अछि ।

(adsbygoogle = विंडो.adsbygoogle || []).पुश ({});

एनटीबी के आंकड़ा बताबैत अछि जे एहि साल जनवरी सं जून के बीच हवाई मार्ग सं 620,453 विदेशी पर्यटक नेपाल आयल छल, जे 2025 के एहि दौरान 577,689 छल.

संबंधित कहानी 2017 केरऽ पहिलऽ छमाही म॑ पर्यटकऽ के आगमन म॑ २८ प्रतिशत के बढ़ोत्तरी

पर्यटन बोर्ड न॑ ई बढ़ोत्तरी के कारण काठमांडू आबै-जाबै के अंतरराष्ट्रीय उड़ान सेवा के विस्तार के कारण बतैलकै, जेकरा स॑ हवाई संपर्क म॑ सुधार होय गेलऽ छै ।

एनटीबीके अनुसार नेपालमे जनवरीमे ९२,५७३, फरवरीमे १०५,४४१, मार्चमे १०२,५१६, अप्रैलमे १०७,९३४, मईमे १०२,६२६ आ जूनमे ९१,३६३ विदेशी पर्यटकके स्वागत भेल अछि ।
